picks.title: Campbell Library Grand Reopening
picks.why: Campbell Library's grand reopening celebrates a brand-new civic space with lion dancers and community festivities.

picks.title: Berryessa Art Festival
picks.why: The 49th Berryessa Art Festival brings thousands together for a day of art, food, and fun in one celebration.

picks.title: 8th Annual International Mother Language Festival: Art & Celebration
picks.why: The 8th Annual International Mother Language Festival showcases Asian American art and cultural celebration at San Jose Museum of Art.

picks.title: 40th Anniversary Bay Bells Hand Bell Choir Concert
picks.why: Bay Bells' 40th Anniversary Hand Bell Choir Concert is a rare milestone performance by a premier community ensemble.

picks.title: FOPAL Book Sale
picks.why: FOPAL Book Sale offers over 70,000 books, CDs, and DVDs across three rooms at unbeatable prices this Sunday.
